title: Nautalius Spear
description: Turns the Diamond Spear into the original false leak spear.
body:
Turns the Diamond Spear into the fake leak conduit spear, renames the diamond spear to "Spear" aswell.

Credits to the original fake leak creators:

neptune_insider on Twitter (Mielonus on Youtube)

styg10m3dus4 on Twitter (StygiomedusaG1g4nt34 on Youtube)
